resultList.dtldesc: This elegant 2 BHK apartment in G.Ks Pride, Yapral, offers a sophisticated living experience in one of Hyderabad’s most serene residential areas. Situated on the top floor of a well-maintained five-storey building, this residence is ideal for those seeking a tranquil and professional home environment. The property combines modern amenities with a strategic location, making it a perfect choice for families or individuals looking for a ready-to-move-in home in a premium neighbourhood.::::Property Specifications::The apartment features a super area of 1,153 sq. ft and a comfortable carpet area of 1,053 sq. ft. The layout includes two spacious bedrooms and two bathrooms, complemented by two balconies that overlook a lush garden, a park, and the main road. The interior is fully furnished and finished with high-quality vitrified and marble flooring, adding a touch of luxury to the space. The property is between 5 to 10 years old and is held under freehold ownership, ensuring a secure and hassle-free resale transaction.::::Facilities::Residents of G.Ks Pride enjoy access to a range of premium facilities designed for a comfortable lifestyle. Security is a priority, with dedicated personnel and systems in place to provide a safe living environment for all residents.::::Locality::Yapral is a well-established and peaceful neighbourhood in Secunderabad, known for its excellent infrastructure and green surroundings. The property is conveniently located near major landmarks, including Reliance Fresh, ensuring that daily shopping needs are met with ease. The locality is well-connected to other parts of Hyderabad via an efficient transport network. Residents have access to reputable educational institutions, healthcare centres, and recreational areas within a short distance. This prime location offers a perfect balance of domestic quietude and urban convenience, making it one of the most desirable residential spots in the city.
